data.body: terminal-manager.ts has ~6 places that branch on memoryManagerType === 'knots' vs 'beads' to pick CLI commands or behavior. This is a leaky abstraction — the memory manager should expose methods for variant behavior (e.g. rollback command, claim command, state advance command) instead of terminal-manager switching on the type string. Audit all memoryManagerType conditionals in terminal-manager.ts and push variant behavior behind the memory manager interface.
data.title: Eliminate memory-manager type switches in terminal-manager
